mechanism_narrative: Rising federal funds rates increase the discount rate for future corporate earnings, directly compressing equity valuations and generating negative S&P 500 forward returns over the next 20 trading days.
failure_condition: Walk-forward Rank IC remains below 0.03 over any 2-year rolling window, or 20-day forward returns in rate hike periods are not significantly higher than baseline.

mechanism_narrative: When the unemployment rate exceeds 5.0 percent, labor market deterioration signals impending corporate earnings declines, driving negative S&P 500 forward returns over the next 60 trading days.
failure_condition: Forward returns remain positive in greater than 55 percent of periods where UNRATE exceeds 5.0 percent, invalidating the recession fear channel.

mechanism_narrative: Simultaneous expansion in retail sales and housing starts confirms broad-based consumer demand strength, which directly boosts corporate revenue expectations and produces positive S&P 500 forward returns over 20 trading days.
failure_condition: The joint signal fails to predict positive returns when either series declines, or Rank IC falls below 0.02 over rolling 3-year windows.

mechanism_narrative: Accelerating industrial production indicates robust manufacturing output and supply-side capacity utilization, which generates positive S&P 500 forward returns over the next 5 trading days during economic expansions.
failure_condition: INDPRO growth fails to predict positive 5-day returns during expansion phases, with out-of-sample accuracy below 52 percent.

mechanism_narrative: Sustained elevation of the consumer price index above 195.0 signals entrenched inflationary pressures that force monetary tightening expectations, compressing equity multiples and generating negative S&P 500 forward returns over 60 trading days.
failure_condition: Forward returns remain positive when CPIAUCSL exceeds 195.0, or the signal loses predictive power during disinflationary periods.

mechanism_narrative: Concurrent growth in total nonfarm payrolls and declining unemployment confirms a tightening labor market that supports wage growth and consumer spending, driving positive S&P 500 forward returns over 20 trading days.
failure_condition: The combined labor signal produces negative forward returns in greater than 60 percent of triggered instances, or interaction term loses statistical significance.

mechanism_narrative: Quarterly gross domestic product growth reflects underlying economic momentum that translates into higher corporate profit forecasts, generating positive S&P 500 forward returns over the next 5 trading days.
failure_condition: GDPC1 growth shows no statistically significant correlation with 5-day forward returns, or Rank IC remains below 0.01 across all rolling windows.

mechanism_narrative: Two consecutive monthly declines in industrial production signal a contraction in manufacturing activity that immediately triggers risk-off positioning, producing negative S&P 500 forward returns over the next 5 trading days.
failure_condition: SPX forward 5-day returns are positive in greater than 55 percent of periods following two consecutive INDPRO declines.
